etymology.description: дәј(дәј) (jГӯ, 'assemble') + е…„(е…„) (xiЕҚng, 'elder brother') again + еҗ…(еҗ…) (xuДҒn, 'call out') = people answering a call together -> all together
etymology.interpretation: The character еғү(qiДҒn, 'all') visually represents multiple people coming together in response to a call, symbolizing unanimity or collective presence. The components emphasize ideas of meeting and speaking in unison.
